jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Thyrocare - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Thyrocare in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Thyrocare:
Thyrocare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thyrocare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
